scripts.deploy:spoke:arbitrum: set SPOKE=arbitrum&& hardhat run scripts/deploy-spoke.js --network arbitrumSepolia
scripts.deploy:spoke:base: set SPOKE=base&& hardhat run scripts/deploy-spoke.js --network baseSepolia
scripts.deploy:spoke:lending:arbitrum: set SPOKE=arbitrum&& hardhat run scripts/deploy-spoke-lending.js --network arbitrumSepolia
scripts.deploy:spoke:lending:base: set SPOKE=base&& hardhat run scripts/deploy-spoke-lending.js --network baseSepolia
scripts.wire:spoke:oracle:arbitrum: set SPOKE=arbitrum&& hardhat run scripts/sync-spoke-oracle.js --network arbitrumSepolia
scripts.wire:spoke:oracle:base: set SPOKE=base&& hardhat run scripts/sync-spoke-oracle.js --network baseSepolia
scripts.sync:spoke:oracle:arbitrum: set SPOKE=arbitrum&& hardhat run scripts/sync-spoke-oracle.js --network arbitrumSepolia
scripts.sync:spoke:oracle:base: set SPOKE=base&& hardhat run scripts/sync-spoke-oracle.js --network baseSepolia
scripts.fund:spoke:arbitrum: set SPOKE=arbitrum&& hardhat run scripts/fund-spoke-lending.js --network arbitrumSepolia
scripts.fund:spoke:base: set SPOKE=base&& hardhat run scripts/fund-spoke-lending.js --network baseSepolia
scripts.smoke:borrow:arbitrum: set SPOKE=arbitrum&& hardhat run scripts/smoke-borrow-spoke.js --network arbitrumSepolia
scripts.smoke:borrow:base: set SPOKE=base&& hardhat run scripts/smoke-borrow-spoke.js --network baseSepolia
scripts.lz:wire-spokes: npm run lz:set-peers && hardhat run scripts/set-peer-spoke.js --network arbitrumSepolia && hardhat run scripts/set-peer-spoke.js --network baseSepolia
scripts.whitelist:all:dry: set WHITELIST_DRY_RUN=1&& hardhat run scripts/whitelist-all-wallets.js --network robinhoodTestnet
scripts.whitelist:ring:dry: set WHITELIST_DRY_RUN=1&& hardhat run scripts/whitelist-defaulter-ring.js --network robinhoodTestnet
